Common.title: Diwan Al Maany | Premium Legal Translation & Services

Hero.subtitle: Certified legal translation and corporate advisory services crafted for prestigious international organizations, sovereign entities, and elite law firms. Where linguistic precision meets absolute legal authority.

About.title: Our Heritage
About.subtitle: Chronicles of Trust & Prestigious Service
About.storyTitle: Linguistic Precision Forged in Legal Excellence
About.storyParagraph1: Established at the crossroads of legal tradition and modern commerce, Diwan Al Maany stands as the premier architectural force in Arabic and international legal translation. We do not merely translate words; we transpose legal gravity, preserve judicial intent, and bridge sovereign jurisdictions with meticulous accuracy.
About.storyParagraph2: Our legacy is built on the pillars of absolute confidentiality, unmatched linguistic mastery, and deep-seated legal expertise. From complex multilateral contracts to state-level treaty documentations, our work carries the official seal of certified authority accepted by embassies, courts, and ministries worldwide.

2010.title: Foundation of Excellence
2010.description: Diwan Al Maany was established in Cairo to provide high-end legal translation services for elite domestic firms.

2015.title: Embassy Certification
2015.description: Achieved official accreditation from major European and international embassies, expanding global legal reach.

2020.title: Digital Transformation & AI integration
2020.description: Launched secure AI-assisted translation glossaries, combining human expertise with cryptographic security.

2024.title: Pan-Arab Regional Expansion
2024.description: Opened dedicated corporate translation hubs in Dubai and Riyadh, servicing sovereign wealth funds.

2026.title: The Golden Seal Initiative
2026.description: Setting the benchmark for premium digital legal workflows, ensuring next-day certified legal delivery.

legal.title: Certified Legal Translation
legal.description: Official translation of court deeds, power of attorney, certificates, and affidavits, authenticated and signed by certified translators for immediate government acceptance.

court.title: Court & Litigation Support
court.description: Comprehensive translation of litigation files, case dossiers, witness statements, and court transcripts with absolute semantic fidelity for judicial proceedings.

corporate.title: Corporate & Financial Services
corporate.description: Structuring elite bilingual corporate articles of association, shareholder agreements, mergers, acquisitions, and compliance documentation for global corporations.

contracts.title: Contract & Treaty Translation
contracts.description: Meticulous legal transposition of commercial agreements, intellectual property covenants, and international sovereign treaties where every comma defines liability.

embassy.title: Embassy & Diplomatic Services
embassy.description: Certified embassy-ready translations for visa documentations, immigration files, and diplomatic correspondence conforming strictly to international consular standards.

consultation.title: Legal Document Review
consultation.description: High-end cross-border legal checks, terminology matching, and bilingual document review by seasoned legal experts to eliminate exposure and risk.

step1.name: Consultation
step1.title: 1. Secure Intake & Consultation
step1.description: We establish a secure communication channel to receive your sensitive legal files under standard NDAs. Our legal coordinators evaluate the jurisdictional context.

step2.name: Document Review
step2.title: 2. Linguistic & Structural Review
step2.description: Senior legal experts review the structural syntax, terms of art, and complex clauses of the document to allocate the correct linguistic specialist.

step3.name: Quotation
step3.title: 3. Bespoke Valuation
step3.description: We provide a transparent, detailed scope of work, outlining delivery timelines, translation tiers, certification stamps, and secure delivery logistics.

step4.name: Translation
step4.title: 4. Sworn Legal Translation
step4.description: Your document is translated by a certified court translator who specializes in the specific legal domain (corporate, litigation, maritime, or criminal).

step5.name: Quality Assurance
step5.title: 5. Dual-Verification QA
step5.description: A second senior legal translation auditor cross-compares the text word-for-word against the source, checking names, dates, financial figures, and legal terms.

step6.name: Certification
step6.title: 6. Official Seal & Certification
step6.description: The document receives the Diwan Al Maany Gold Seal of Authenticity and is signed by our sworn certified translator, making it legally binding.

step7.name: Delivery
step7.title: 7. Secure Courier & Digital Release
step7.description: We dispatch the physical certified documents via secure courier and release encrypted, digitally signed PDF copies directly to your legal team.

Languages.title: Global Reach
Languages.subtitle: Bridging International Jurisdictions
Languages.description: We support dynamic translations across 30+ language pairs, directly aligning with diplomatic and trade missions worldwide.

AiTech.title: Future of Law
AiTech.subtitle: Augmented Intelligence, Absolute Precision
AiTech.description: We harness advanced AI models trained specifically on bilingual legal archives to accelerate drafts and ensure terminology consistency. Every automated stage is audited and perfected by human sworn experts.

card1.title: Neural Legal Glossaries
card1.description: Real-time database linking regional legal terminology across civil, common, and sharia law structures, updated dynamically by our legal council.

card2.title: Cryptographic Integrity
card2.description: All legal documents undergo SHA-256 verification, ensuring that the certified translation remains untampered and verifiable.

card3.title: Automated Formatting Preservation
card3.description: Bespoke parsers retain the exact visual styling, official seals, and signatures of the original court file in the translated output.

Testimonials.title: The Endorsements
Testimonials.subtitle: Words from Sovereign Partners & Top-Tier Counsel

quote1.author: Dr. Tariq Al-Mansoor

quote2.quote: The certified translation of our merger contracts was accepted by the Ministry without a single note. An absolute masterclass in legal translation.
quote2.author: Victoria Sterling

quote3.quote: In diplomatic translation, there is no margin for error. Diwan Al Maany delivers museum-grade accuracy and executive discretion on every assignment.
quote3.author: Ambassador H.E. Youssef Kamal
